name: es_loyalty_realtime_events
description: Real-time leg of the platform: POS terminals publish loyalty earn/redeem events to Event Hubs as they happen (a customer redeeming points at checkout, a points expiry job firing). This Eventstream lands them directly into the Bronze Lakehouse, sitting alongside the batch ADF/Databricks pipeline for transactions/customers/products/stores, which only need daily freshness.
notes: This realtime table is unioned with the batch bronze.loyalty_events table (from 01_bronze_ingest.py) in 02_silver_cleanse.py before SCD2/referential-integrity checks run, so both feeds converge into one Silver table regardless of arrival path.
